zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisela Schenfeld於1454年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特莫林根時，她的父親Jan von Schoenfeld54歲，母親Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz24歲。她和Jacob Friderich Wolff至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1550年在她的家鄉享年96歲。

nameMeanings.name: Schenfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Yoel, Aron, Elihu, Hyman, Mordechi, Naftula, Sholom, Tovia, Zalman.  German Klaus, Erwin, Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Schoenfeld
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Franz, Klaus, Adelheid, Eugen, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard, Hanns.
German (Schönfeld): habitational name from any of numerous places called Schönfeld, from Middle High German schoen ‘beautiful’ + velt ‘open country, field’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönfeld): artificial name composed of German schön ‘beautiful’ + Feld ‘field’. Compare Schonfeld .

nameMeanings.name: Gisela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Giselle
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisela Schenfeld was born in 1454, in Möhringen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Jan von Schoenfeld, was 54 and her mother, Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, was 24. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Jacob Friderich Wolff. She died in 1550, in her hometown, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gisela Schenfeld est née en 1454, à Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Jan von Schoenfeld, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Jacob Friderich Wolff. Elle est décédée en 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisela Schenfeld 1454 in Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jan von Schoenfeld 54 und ihre Mutter Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz 24. Sie hatte mit Jacob Friderich Wolff mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 96 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gisela Schenfeld è nata il nel 1454 nel Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Jan von Schoenfeld, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Jacob Friderich Wolff. Morì nel 1550, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gisela Schenfeldが1454年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートムohリンジェンで生まれた時，父Jan von Schoenfeldは54歳，母Margarethe Marschall von Mockritzは24歳であった。彼女はJacob Friderich Wolffとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1550年に故郷で96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gisela Schenfeld(이)가 1454년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트 oh링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jan von Schoenfeld(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Jacob Friderich Wolff(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 그녀의 고향에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gisela Schenfeld nasceu em 1454, em Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Jan von Schoenfeld, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Jacob Friderich Wolff. Ela faleceu em 1550, em sua cidade natal, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisela Schenfeld родилась в 1454 г. в местности мoхринген, обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Jan von Schoenfeld было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, 24. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Jacob Friderich Wolff. Она умерла в 1550 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gisela Schenfeld nació en 1454, en Möhringen, Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Jan von Schoenfeld, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Margarethe Marschall von Mockritz, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Jacob Friderich Wolff. Murió en 1550, en su pueblo, a la edad de 96 años.
